reviews.review_description: A pretty good slenderman game for VR
All I see when I open it is a white screen???

reviews.review_title: The only VR Slender Man game anymore.
reviews.review_description:
I was pissed when Slender the Arrival was never updated to work with the CV1, and no other company made one after all this time. 

This one isn’t the best rendition of the game but it still is creepy. It even uses the same sound bytes and pages, even though there are only 5 of them instead of 10. 

It performs well on the Go, and has free movement using the track pad. 

The cons are invisible walls, no death screen, no increased heartbeat as you get more pages, no flashlight. 

Other than those qualms it is not a bad Slender game. I just wish it would get an update to add more. If you’re a fan I’d say pick it up.
